_comment: Captured 2026-07-20 from __NEXT_DATA__.props.pageProps.modelPreviews on https://www.leasingoptions.co.uk/car-leasing/electric (two dataItems, verbatim apart from dropped image/feature/review arrays). NOTE THE SHAPE: unlike topSpecialOffers (a plain array), modelPreviews is an OBJECT wrapping its array in `dataItems` — which is why buildOfferMap, iterating only array-valued pageProps, skipped it entirely and category/model pages got no badges. Entries carry the same {vehicleRef, deals} shape as topSpecialOffers, PLUS `make` and `shortModelUrl` which are what model cards link by (/car-leasing/peugeot/3008), since model-card hrefs have no /<ref>/vehicle segment. Pinned for tests: Peugeot 3008 PCH -> term 24mo (2 years x12), mileage 5000, monthly 218.76, initial 2625.12 (12 x monthly), +399.99 fee -> total 8056.59, effective 335.69. The card's displayed 'from £218.76' equals this deal's monthlyPrice exactly, so the badge is exact.
